entries.title: First mass-produced automobile
entries.description: Ford began assembly-line production of the Model T, making car ownership affordable for the middle class.
entries.subtitle: Ford Motor Company

entries.title: First liquid-fueled rocket flight
entries.description: Robert Goddard launched the first rocket powered by liquid propellant, reaching an altitude of 12.5 meters.
entries.subtitle: Robert Goddard

entries.title: First commercial jet airliner service
entries.description: BOAC's de Havilland Comet began the world's first scheduled jet airliner service.
entries.subtitle: BOAC

entries.title: First artificial satellite
entries.description: The Soviet Union launched Sputnik 1, the first human-made object to orbit Earth, starting the Space Age.

entries.title: First human spaceflight
entries.description: Cosmonaut Yuri Gagarin became the first person to orbit Earth, aboard Vostok 1.
entries.subtitle: Yuri Gagarin

entries.title: First Moon landing
entries.description: Apollo 11 astronauts Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin became the first humans to walk on the Moon.
entries.subtitle: Neil Armstrong & Buzz Aldrin

entries.title: First supersonic passenger service
entries.description: Concorde began the only supersonic passenger airline service ever operated commercially.
entries.subtitle: Concorde

entries.title: First Tesla Roadster delivered
entries.description: Tesla delivered its first Roadster, the first highway-legal all-electric car to use lithium-ion cells and the first modern mass-produced EV.
entries.subtitle: Tesla, Inc.

entries.title: First reusable orbital rocket landing
entries.description: SpaceX landed a Falcon 9 first stage back on Earth after an orbital launch, a first for orbital-class rockets.
entries.subtitle: SpaceX

entries.title: First private crewed orbital spaceflight
entries.description: SpaceX's Crew Dragon Demo-2 carried NASA astronauts to the ISS, the first crewed orbital flight by a commercially built and operated spacecraft.
entries.subtitle: SpaceX
